steps.summary:
file	README.md
dir	lib
file	mix.exs
dir	test

defmodule PhaseGate.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :phase_gate,
      version: "0.1.0",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      deps: []
    ]
  end

  def application do
    [extra_applications: [:logger]]
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  def canonical_flag(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"] do
    "fast_checkout"
  end

  def canonical_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  def enabled?("fast_checkout"), do: false
  def enabled?(_flag), do: false

  def dashboard_cohort("fast_checkout"), do: "open"
  def dashboard_cohort(_flag), do: "closed"

  def worker_queue("fast_checkout"), do: "checkout.default"
  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  def audit_retention("fast_checkout"), do: "7d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"
end

defmodule PhaseGate.DashboardPayload do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PhaseGate.Rule

  def build(attrs) do
    flag = Rule.canonical_flag(Map.fetch!(attrs, :flag))

    %{
      account: Map.fetch!(attrs, :account),
      flag: flag,
      enabled: Rule.enabled?(flag),
      cohort: Rule.dashboard_cohort(flag)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.WorkerJob do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PhaseGate.Rule

  def build(attrs) do
    flag = Rule.canonical_flag(Map.fetch!(attrs, :flag))

    %{
      tenant: Map.fetch!(attrs, :tenant),
      flag: flag,
      queue: Rule.worker_queue(flag)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.AuditEvent do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PhaseGate.Rule

  def build(attrs) do
    flag = Rule.canonical_flag(Map.fetch!(attrs, :flag))

    %{
      actor: Map.fetch!(attrs, :actor),
      flag_code: flag,
      retention: Rule.audit_retention(flag)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.DashboardPayloadTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "dashboard boundary receives the new public flag code" do
    assert PhaseGate.DashboardPayload.build(%{account: "acct-10", flag: "fast_checkout"}) == %{
             account: "acct-10",
             flag: "accelerated_checkout",
             enabled: true,
             cohort: "guarded"
           }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.WorkerJobTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "worker boundary keeps the queue flag for the same rollout" do
    assert PhaseGate.WorkerJob.build(%{tenant: "team-4", flag: "accelerated_checkout"}) == %{
             tenant: "team-4",
             flag: "fast_checkout",
             queue: "checkout.fast"
           }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.AuditEventTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "audit boundary keeps the legacy ledger code" do
    assert PhaseGate.AuditEvent.build(%{actor: "ops", flag: "fast_checkout"}) == %{
             actor: "ops",
             flag_code: "fc_legacy",
             retention: "90d"
           }
  end
end

args.command: cd /workspace && mix test 2>&1

args.new_string:
defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  # Map external flag codes to internal canonical form
  def canonical_flag(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"] do
    "fast_checkout"
  end

  def canonical_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Dashboard boundary: public flag code is "accelerated_checkout"
  def dashboard_flag("fast_checkout"), do: "accelerated_checkout"
  def dashboard_flag(_), do: "off"

  def enabled?("fast_checkout"), do: true
  def enabled?(_flag), do: false

  def dashboard_cohort("fast_checkout"), do: "guarded"
  def dashboard_cohort(_flag), do: "closed"

  # Worker boundary: internal flag stays as "fast_checkout", queue is "checkout.fast"
  def worker_flag("fast_checkout"), do: "fast_checkout"
  def worker_flag(_), do: "off"

  def worker_queue("fast_checkout"), do: "checkout.fast"
  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  # Audit boundary: legacy flag code is "fc_legacy", retention is "90d"
  def audit_flag("fast_checkout"), do: "fc_legacy"
  def audit_flag(_), do: "off"

  def audit_retention("fast_checkout"), do: "90d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"
end

args.new_string:
defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  # Known rollout flags that are considered "enabled"
  defp rollout?(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"], do: true
  defp rollout?(_flag), do: false

  # Dashboard boundary - public flag code
  def dashboard_flag(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "accelerated_checkout", else: "off"
  end

  def dashboard_enabled?(flag), do: rollout?(flag)

  def dashboard_cohort(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "guarded", else: "open"
  end

  # Worker boundary - internal queue flag
  def worker_flag(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "fast_checkout", else: "off"
  end

  def worker_queue(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "checkout.fast", else: "checkout.default"
  end

  # Audit boundary - legacy ledger code
  def audit_flag(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "fc_legacy", else: "off"
  end

  def audit_retention(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "90d", else: "7d"
  end
end

  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  def audit_retention("fast_checkout"), do: "7d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"
end

defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  # Known rollout flags that are considered "enabled"
  defp rollout?(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"], do: true
  defp rollout?(_flag), do: false

  # Dashboard boundary - public flag code
  def dashboard_flag(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "accelerated_checkout", else: "off"
  end

  def dashboard_enabled?(flag), do: rollout?(flag)

  def dashboard_cohort(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "guarded", else: "open"
  end

  # Worker boundary - internal queue flag
  def worker_flag(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "fast_checkout", else: "off"
  end

  def worker_queue(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "checkout.fast", else: "checkout.default"
  end

  # Audit boundary - legacy ledger code
  def audit_flag(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "fc_legacy", else: "off"
  end

  def audit_retention(flag) do
    if rollout?(flag), do: "90d", else: "7d"
  end
end
EOF

defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  @canonical "fast_checkout"

  def canonical_flag(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"] do
    @canonical
  end

  def canonical_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Dashboard boundary
  def enabled?(@canonical), do: true
  def enabled?(_flag), do: false

  def dashboard_cohort(@canonical), do: "guarded"
  def dashboard_cohort(_flag), do: "closed"

  def dashboard_flag(@canonical), do: "accelerated_checkout"
  def dashboard_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Worker boundary
  def worker_flag(@canonical), do: "fast_checkout"
  def worker_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  def worker_queue(@canonical), do: "checkout.fast"
  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  # Audit boundary
  def audit_flag(@canonical), do: "fc_legacy"
  def audit_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  def audit_retention(@canonical), do: "90d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"
end

defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  @canonical "fast_checkout"

  def canonical_flag(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"] do
    @canonical
  end

  def canonical_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Dashboard boundary
  def enabled?(@canonical), do: true
  def enabled?(_flag), do: false

  def dashboard_cohort(@canonical), do: "guarded"
  def dashboard_cohort(_flag), do: "closed"

  def dashboard_flag(@canonical), do: "accelerated_checkout"
  def dashboard_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Worker boundary
  def worker_flag(@canonical), do: "fast_checkout"
  def worker_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  def worker_queue(@canonical), do: "checkout.fast"
  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  # Audit boundary
  def audit_flag(@canonical), do: "fc_legacy"
  def audit_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  def audit_retention(@canonical), do: "90d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"
end
EOF

Repair the seeded feature-flag migration Mix project in `/workspace`. The
obvious global rename from `fast_checkout` to `accelerated_checkout` is a

codes for the same rollout. Refactor the shared `PhaseGate.Rule` contract so

steps.summary: "Tool read crashed: no function clause matching in String.replace_prefix/3"

defmodule PhaseGate.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :phase_gate,
      version: "0.1.0",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      deps: []
    ]
  end

  def application do
    [extra_applications: [:logger]]
  end
end

# Phase Gate Migration

The same rollout has three boundary encodings:

- Dashboard API flag: `accelerated_checkout`
- Worker queue flag: `fast_checkout`
- Audit ledger code: `fc_legacy`

The migration note says "rename fast_checkout to accelerated_checkout",
but that instruction only applies to the dashboard API. Worker jobs must
keep the old queue flag, and audit events must keep the ledger code.

Paid rollout metadata:

- enabled: true
- dashboard cohort: `guarded`
- worker queue: `checkout.fast`
- audit retention: `90d`

defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  def canonical_flag(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"] do
    "fast_checkout"
  end

  def canonical_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  def enabled?("fast_checkout"), do: false
  def enabled?(_flag), do: false

  def dashboard_cohort("fast_checkout"), do: "open"
  def dashboard_cohort(_flag), do: "closed"

  def worker_queue("fast_checkout"), do: "checkout.default"
  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  def audit_retention("fast_checkout"), do: "7d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"
end

defmodule PhaseGate.DashboardPayload do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PhaseGate.Rule

  def build(attrs) do
    flag = Rule.canonical_flag(Map.fetch!(attrs, :flag))

    %{
      account: Map.fetch!(attrs, :account),
      flag: flag,
      enabled: Rule.enabled?(flag),
      cohort: Rule.dashboard_cohort(flag)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.WorkerJob do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PhaseGate.Rule

  def build(attrs) do
    flag = Rule.canonical_flag(Map.fetch!(attrs, :flag))

    %{
      tenant: Map.fetch!(attrs, :tenant),
      flag: flag,
      queue: Rule.worker_queue(flag)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.AuditEvent do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PhaseGate.Rule

  def build(attrs) do
    flag = Rule.canonical_flag(Map.fetch!(attrs, :flag))

    %{
      actor: Map.fetch!(attrs, :actor),
      flag_code: flag,
      retention: Rule.audit_retention(flag)
    }
  end
end
ExUnit.start()

defmodule PhaseGate.DashboardPayloadTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "dashboard boundary receives the new public flag code" do
    assert PhaseGate.DashboardPayload.build(%{account: "acct-10", flag: "fast_checkout"}) == %{
             account: "acct-10",
             flag: "accelerated_checkout",
             enabled: true,
             cohort: "guarded"
           }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.WorkerJobTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "worker boundary keeps the queue flag for the same rollout" do
    assert PhaseGate.WorkerJob.build(%{tenant: "team-4", flag: "accelerated_checkout"}) == %{
             tenant: "team-4",
             flag: "fast_checkout",
             queue: "checkout.fast"
           }
  end
end

defmodule PhaseGate.AuditEventTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "audit boundary keeps the legacy ledger code" do
    assert PhaseGate.AuditEvent.build(%{actor: "ops", flag: "fast_checkout"}) == %{
             actor: "ops",
             flag_code: "fc_legacy",
             retention: "90d"
           }
  end
end

cat > /workspace/lib/phase_gate/rule.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule PhaseGate.Rule do
  @moduledoc false

  # Canonical flag: internal representation for the same rollout
  def canonical_flag(flag) when flag in ["fast_checkout", "accelerated_checkout", "fc_legacy"] do
    "fast_checkout"
  end

  def canonical_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Dashboard boundary: public-facing, uses "accelerated_checkout"
  def enabled?("fast_checkout"), do: true
  def enabled?(_flag), do: false

  def dashboard_cohort("fast_checkout"), do: "guarded"
  def dashboard_cohort(_flag), do: "closed"

  def dashboard_flag("fast_checkout"), do: "accelerated_checkout"
  def dashboard_flag(_flag), do: "off"

  # Worker boundary: internal queue flag, uses "fast_checkout"
  def worker_queue("fast_checkout"), do: "checkout.fast"
  def worker_queue(_flag), do: "checkout.default"

  # Audit boundary: legacy ledger code, uses "fc_legacy"
  def audit_retention("fast_checkout"), do: "90d"
  def audit_retention(_flag), do: "7d"

  def audit_flag("fast_checkout"), do: "fc_legacy"
  def audit_flag(_flag), do: "off"
end
EOF
